DataRequest.techniqueName: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel,User Execution: Malicious File
DataRequest.Name: Shai-Hulud activity within a host / SCW
DataRequest.Description: This rule is a compilation of threat hunting querys that are correlated with activity off the APT commonly knowned as Shai-Hulud.
DataRequest.DataSource: Linux Process Monitoring via FortiSIEM Agent, Windows Sysmon

SubPattern.name: Commands_ShaiHulud
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN ("Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process","LINUX_PROCESS_EXEC","PH_RULE_TH_Linux_process_exec_temp") AND (command CONTAIN "trufflehog" OR fileName CONTAIN "trufflehog" OR paraName CONTAIN "trufflehog" OR swParam CONTAIN "trufflehog")

DataRequest.IncidentTitle: A Shai-Hulud IOC was found in $srcIpAddr
